{\n211\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"MQTT connection timeout\")\n212\t\t}\n213\t\tif err := token.Error(); err != nil {\n214\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"MQTT connect failed: %w\", ─────────────────────────────────────────\n302\t\n303\t// PublishDeviceTracker publishes a device tracker for a person.\n304\tfunc (c *Client) PublishDeviceTracker(personID, personName string) error fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel/sensor/%s/state\", sensorID)\n433\t\n434\t\tvar data []byte\n435\t\tswitch v := value.(type) {\n436\t\tcase string:\n437\t\t\tdata = []byte(v)\n438\t\tcase []byte:\n439\t\t\tdata = v\n440\t\tdefault:\n441\t\t\tdata, _ = json.Marshal(map[string]interface{}{\"value\": value})\n442\t\t}\n443\t\n444\t\treturn c.Publish(stateTopic, data)\n445\t}\n446\t\n447\t// PublishZone publishes a zone occupancy sensor.\n448\tfunc (c *Client) PublishZone(zoneID, zoneName string) error {\n449\t\tif !c.config.DiscoveryEnabled {\n450\t\t\treturn nil\n451\t\t}\n452\t\n453\t\tentityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_zone_%s\", zoneID)\n454\t\treturn c.PublishSensor(entityID, fmt.Sprintf(\"%s Occupancy\", zoneName), \"\", \"people\")\n455\t}\n456\t\n457\t// UpdateZoneOccupancy updates zone occupancy count.\n458\tfunc (c *Client) UpdateZoneOccupancy(zoneID string, count int) error {\n459\t\tentityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_zone_%s\", zoneID)\n460\t\treturn c.UpdateSensorState(entityID, count)\n461\t}\n462\t\n463\t// PublishPredictionSensors publishes prediction sensors for a person.\n464\tfunc (c *Client) PublishPredictionSensors(personID, personName string) error {\n465\t\tif !c.config.DiscoveryEnabled {\n466\t\t\treturn nil\n467\t\t}\n468\t\n469\t\t// Predicted zone sensor\n470\t\tpredictedZoneID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_predicted_zone\", personID)\n471\t\tif err := c.PublishSensor(predictedZoneID, fmt.Sprintf(\"%s Predicted Zone\", personName), \"\", \"\"); err != nil {\n472\t\t\treturn err\n473\t\t}\n474\t\n475\t\t// Prediction confidence sensor\n476\t\tconfidenceID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_prediction_confidence\", personID)\n477\t\tif err := c.PublishSensor(confidenceID, fmt.Sprintf(\"%s Prediction Confidence\", personName), \"probability\", \"%\"); err != nil {\n478\t\t\treturn err\n479\t\t}\n480\t\n481\t\t// Estimated transition time sensor\n482\t\ttransitionID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_transition_minutes\", personID)\n483\t\tif err := c.PublishSensor(transitionID, fmt.Sprintf(\"%s Estimated Transition\", personName), \"duration\", \"min\"); err != nil {\n484\t\t\treturn err\n485\t\t}\n486\t\n487\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] MQTT: Published prediction sensors for %s\", personName)\n488\t\treturn nil\n489\t}\n490\t\n491\t// UpdatePredictionState updates prediction sensors for a person.\n492\tfunc (c *Client) UpdatePredictionState(personID string, predictedZone, dataConfidence string, confidence, estimatedMinutes float64) error {\n493\t\t// Update predicted zone\n494\t\tpredictedZoneID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_predicted_zone\", personID)\n495\t\tif err := c.UpdateSensorState(predictedZoneID, predictedZone); err != nil {\n496\t\t\treturn err\n497\t\t}\n498\t\n499\t\t// Update confidence (as percentage)\n500\t\tconfidenceID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_prediction_confidence\", personID)\n501\t\tconfidencePercent := confidence * 100\n502\t\tif err := c.UpdateSensorState(confidenceID, fmt.Sprintf(\"%.1f\", confidencePercent)); err != nil {\n503\t\t\treturn err\n504\t\t}\n505\t\n506\t\t// Update estimated transition time\n507\t\ttransitionID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_transition_minutes\", personID)\n508\t\treturn c.UpdateSensorState(transitionID, fmt.Sprintf(\"%.1f\", estimatedMinutes))\n509\t}\n510\t\n511\t// publishAllDiscoveryConfigs re-publishes all discovery configs.\n512\tfunc (c *Client) publishAllDiscoveryConfigs() {\n513\t\t// This is called on reconnect to ensure entities remain in HA\n514\t\t// The actual entities are published as people/devices are registered\n515\t\n516\t\tc.mu.RLock()\n517\t\tentities := len(c.publishedEntities)\n518\t\tc.mu.RUnlock()\n519\t\n520\t\tlog.Printf(\"[DEBUG] MQTT: Re-publishing %d discovery configs\", entities)\n521\t}\n522\t\n523\t// RemoveEntity removes an entity from HA.\n524\tfunc (c *Client) RemoveEntity(entityType, entityID string) error {\n525\t\tconfigTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s/spaxel_%s/config\", c.config.DiscoveryPrefix, entityType, entityID)\n526\t\n527\t\t// Publish empty retained message to remove\n528\t\treturn c.PublishRetained(configTopic, []byte{})\n529\t}\n530\t\n531\t// GetBrokerHost extracts host from broker URL.\n532\tfunc (c *Client) GetBrokerHost() string {\n533\t\tif u, err := url.Parse(c.config.Broker); err == nil {\n534\t\t\treturn u.Hostname()\n535\t\t}\n536\t\treturn c.config.Broker\n537\t}\n538\t\n539\t// ─── Home Assistant Auto-Discovery Extensions []byte) {\n838\t\t\tmode := string(payload)\n839\t\t\tif mode == \"home\" || mode == \"away\" || mode == \"sleep\" {\n840\t\t\t\thandler(mode)\n841\t\t\t}\n842\t\t})\n843\t}\n844\t\n845\t// sensor\n855\t\toccupancyEntityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_zone_%s_occupancy\", c.config.MothershipID, zoneID)\n856\t\toccupancyTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/sensor/%s/config\", c.config.DiscoveryPrefix, occupancyEntityID)\n857\t\tc.PublishRetained(occupancyTopic, []byte{})\n858\t\n859\t\t// Remove binary sensor\n860\t\tbinaryEntityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_zone_%s_occupied\", []byte{})\n863\t}\n864\t\n865\t// GetMothershipID returns the mothership ID used for this client.\n866\tfunc (c *Client) GetMothershipID() string {\n867\t\tc.mu.RLock()\n868\t\tdefer c.mu.RUnlock()\n869\t\treturn c.config.MothershipID\n870\t}\n871\t\n872\t// ─── Dynamic Configuration ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n873\t\n874\t// UpdateConfig updates the client configuration and reconnects if the broker changed.\n875\tfunc (c *Client) UpdateConfig(ctx context.Context, newCfg Config) error {\n876\t\tc.mu.Lock()\n877\t\tdefer c.mu.Unlock()\n878\t\n879\t\t// Check if broker changed - requires reconnection\n880\t\tbrokerChanged := c.config.Broker != newCfg.Broker ||\n881\t\t\tc.config.Username != newCfg.Username ||\n882\t\t\tc.config.Password != newCfg.Password ||\n883\t\t\tc.config.TLS != newCfg.TLS\n884\t\n885\t\t// Update discovery prefix and mothership ID (don't require reconnect)\n886\t\tc.config.DiscoveryPrefix = newCfg.DiscoveryPrefix\n887\t\tif newCfg.MothershipID != \"\" && newCfg.MothershipID != c.config.MothershipID {\n888\t\t\tc.config.MothershipID = newCfg.MothershipID\n889\t\t\tc.spaxelDevice.Identifiers = []string{fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s\", newCfg.MothershipID)}\n890\t\t\t// Clear published entities since IDs changed\n891\t\t\tc.publishedEntities = make(map[string]bool)\n892\t\t}\n893\t\n894\t\tif brokerChanged {\n895\t\t\t// Disconnect existing client\n896\t\t\tif c.client != nil && c.client.IsConnected() {\n897\t\t\t\tc.client.Disconnect(250)\n898\t\t\t}\n899\t\t\tc.connected = false\n900\t\n901\t\t\t// Create new client with updated config\n902\t\t\tc.config.Broker = newCfg.Broker\n903\t\t\tc.config.Username = newCfg.Username\n904\t\t\tc.config.Password = newCfg.Password\n905\t\t\tc.config.TLS = newCfg.TLS\n906\t\n907\t\t\t// Rebuild client options\n908\t\t\tif c.config.ClientID == \"\" {\n909\t\t\t\tc.config.ClientID = fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel-%s\", c.config.MothershipID)\n910\t\t\t}\n911\t\t\tif c.config.TopicPrefix == \"\" {\n912\t\t\t\tc.config.TopicPrefix = \"spaxel\"\n913\t\t\t}\n914\t\t\tif c.config.DiscoveryPrefix == \"\" {\n915\t\t\t\tc.config.DiscoveryPrefix = \"homeassistant\"\n916\t\t\t}\n917\t\n918\t\t\topts := mqtt.NewClientOptions()\n919\t\t\topts.AddBroker(c.config.Broker)\n920\t\t\topts.SetClientID(c.config.ClientID)\n921\t\t\topts.SetKeepAlive(c.config.KeepAlive)\n922\t\t\topts.SetMaxReconnectInterval(c.config.ReconnectMax)\n923\t\t\topts.SetAutoReconnect(true)\n924\t\t\topts.SetCleanSession(false)\n925\t\n926\t\t\tif c.config.Username != \"\" {\n927\t\t\t\topts.SetUsername(c.config.Username)\n928\t\t\t}\n929\t\t\tif c.config.Password != \"\" {\n930\t\t\t\topts.SetPassword(c.config.Password)\n931\t\t\t}\n932\t\n933\t\t\tif c.config.TLS {\n934\t\t\t\topts.SetTLSConfig(&tls.Config{\n935\t\t\t\t\tInsecureSkipVerify: true,\n936\t\t\t\t})\n937\t\t\t}\n938\t\n939\t\t\tlwtTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/availability\", c.config.TopicPrefix)\n940\t\t\topts.SetBinaryWill(lwtTopic, []byte(\"offline\"), 1, true)\n941\t\n942\t\t\t// Set up callbacks (copy from NewClient)\n943\t\t\tclientRef := c\n944\t\t\topts.OnConnect = func(client mqtt.Client) ID -> published\n\n\t// Callbacks\n\tonConnect    func()\n\tonDisconnect func()\n}\n\n// NewClient creates a new MQTT client.\nfunc NewClient(cfg Config) (*Client, error) {\n\tif cfg.Broker == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"MQTT broker URL required\")\n\t}\n\n\tif cfg.MothershipID == \"\" {\n\t\tcfg.MothershipID = \"spaxel\"\n\t}\n\tif cfg.ClientID == \"\" {\n\t\tcfg.ClientID = fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel-%s\", cfg.MothershipID)\n\t}\n\tif cfg.TopicPrefix == \"\" {\n\t\tcfg.TopicPrefix = \"spaxel\"\n\t}\n\tif cfg.DiscoveryPrefix == \"\" {\n\t\tcfg.DiscoveryPrefix = \"homeassistant\"\n\t}\n\tif cfg.KeepAlive == 0 {\n\t\tcfg.KeepAlive = 30 * time.Second\n\t}\n\tif cfg.ConnectTimeout == 0 {\n\t\tcfg.ConnectTimeout = 10 * time.Second\n\t}\n\tif cfg.ReconnectMin == 0 {\n\t\tcfg.ReconnectMin = 5 * time.Second\n\t}\n\tif cfg.ReconnectMax == 0 {\n\t\tcfg.ReconnectMax = 120 * time.Second\n\t}\n\n\tc := &Client{\n\t\tconfig: cfg,\n\t\tspaxelDevice: HomeAssistantDevice{\n\t\t\tIdentifiers:  []string{fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s\", cfg.MothershipID)},\n\t\t\tName:         \"Spaxel\",\n\t\t\tModel:        \"Spaxel Presence System\",\n\t\t\tManufacturer: \"Spaxel\",\n\t\t},\n\t\tpublishedEntities: make(map[string]bool),\n\t}\n\n\topts := mqtt.NewClientOptions()\n\topts.AddBroker(cfg.Broker)\n\topts.SetClientID(cfg.ClientID)\n\topts.SetKeepAlive(cfg.KeepAlive)\n\n\t// Enable auto-reconnect with exponential backoff from ReconnectMin to ReconnectMax\n\topts.SetMaxReconnectInterval(cfg.ReconnectMax)\n\topts.SetAutoReconnect(true)\n\topts.SetCleanSession(false) // Use persistent sessions for retained messages\n\n\tif cfg.Username != \"\" {\n\t\topts.SetUsername(cfg.Username)\n\t}\n\tif cfg.Password != \"\" {\n\t\topts.SetPassword(cfg.Password)\n\t}\n\n\t// Configure TLS if enabled\n\tif cfg.TLS {\n\t\topts.SetTLSConfig(&tls.Config{\n\t\t\tInsecureSkipVerify: true, // Allow self-signed certs\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\t// Set Last Will and Testament for availability\n\tlwtTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/availability\", cfg.TopicPrefix)\n\topts.SetBinaryWill(lwtTopic, []byte(\"offline\"), 1, true)\n\n\topts.OnConnect = func(client mqtt.Client) {\n\t\tc.mu.Lock()\n\t\tc.connected = true\n\t\tcb := c.onConnect\n\t\tc.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] MQTT connected to %s\", cfg.Broker)\n\n\t\t// Publish online status\n\t\tif err := c.PublishRetained(lwtTopic, []byte(\"online\")); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to publish availability: %v\", err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Publish discovery configs on reconnect\n\t\tif cfg.DiscoveryEnabled {\n\t\t\tgo c.publishAllDiscoveryConfigs()\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif cb != nil {\n\t\t\tgo cb()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\topts.SetConnectionLostHandler(func(client mqtt.Client, err error) {\n\t\tc.mu.Lock()\n\t\tc.connected = false\n\t\tcb := c.onDisconnect\n\t\tc.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] MQTT disconnected: %v\", err)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] MQTT disconnected\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif cb != nil {\n\t\t\tgo cb()\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tc.client = mqtt.NewClient(opts)\n\treturn c, nil\n}\n\n// Connect establishes connection to MQTT broker.\nfunc (c *Client) Connect(ctx context.Context) error {\n\ttoken := c.client.Connect()\n\tif !token.WaitTimeout(c.config.ConnectTimeout) {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"MQTT connection timeout\")\n\t}\n\tif err := token.Error(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"MQTT connect failed: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// Disconnect closes the MQTT connection.\nfunc (c *Client) Disconnect() {\n\tc.client.Disconnect(250) // 250ms grace period\n\tc.mu.Lock()\n\tc.connected = false\n\tc.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// IsConnected returns true if connected to broker.\nfunc (c *Client) IsConnected() bool {\n\tc.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer c.mu.RUnlock()\n\treturn c.connected\n}\n\n// SetOnConnect sets callback for connection events.\nfunc (c *Client) SetOnConnect(cb func()) {\n\tc.mu.Lock()\n\tc.onConnect = cb\n\tc.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetOnDisconnect sets callback for disconnection events.\nfunc (c *Client) SetOnDisconnect(cb func()) {\n\tc.mu.Lock()\n\tc.onDisconnect = cb\n\tc.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// Publish publishes a message to a topic.\nfunc (c *Client) Publish(topic string, payload []byte) error {\n\tc.mu.RLock()\n\tconnected := c.connected\n\tc.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif !connected {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"MQTT not connected\")\n\t}\n\n\ttoken := c.client.Publish(topic, 1, false, payload)\n\tif token.Wait() && token.Error() != nil {\n\t\treturn token.Error()\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// PublishRetained publishes a retained message.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishRetained(topic string, payload []byte) error {\n\tc.mu.RLock()\n\tconnected := c.connected\n\tc.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif !connected {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"MQTT not connected\")\n\t}\n\n\ttoken := c.client.Publish(topic, 1, true, payload)\n\tif not_home\n\t}\n\tfor k, v := range attributes {\n\t\tpayload[k] = v\n\t}\n\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(payload)\n\treturn c.Publish(stateTopic, data)\n}\n\n// PublishBinarySensor publishes a binary sensor (e.g., motion, fall detected).\nfunc (c *Client) PublishBinarySensor(sensorID, name, deviceClass string) error {\n\tif !c.config.DiscoveryEnabled {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tentityID := \"OFF\"\n\tif on {\n\t\tstate = \"ON\"\n\t}\n\n\treturn c.Publish(stateTopic, []byte(state))\n}\n\n// PublishSensor publishes a sensor entity.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishSensor(sensorID, name, broker\n\t\treturn c.Connect(ctx)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// Reconnect attempts to reconnect to the MQTT broker.\nfunc (c *Client) Reconnect(ctx context.Context) error mode\n77\t//\tPOST   /api/mode                 — set system mode\n78\tfunc (h *Handler) RegisterRoutes(r chi.Router) {\n79\t\tr.Get(\"/api/fleet\", h.listFleet) // Extended fleet data with computed fields\n80\t\tr.Get(\"/api/nodes\", h.listNodes)\n81\t\tr.Get(\"/api/nodes/{mac}\", h.getNode)\n82\t\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/role\", h.setNodeRole)\n83\t\tr.Put(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/position\", h.updateNodePosition)\n84\t\tr.Patch(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/label\", h.updateNodeLabel)\n85\t\tr.Delete(\"/api/nodes/{mac}\", h.deleteNode)\n86\t\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/identify\", h.identifyNode)\n87\t\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/locate\", h.identifyNode) // alias for identify\n88\t\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/reboot\", h.rebootNode)\n89\t\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/ota\", h.triggerNodeOTA)\n90\t\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/update-all\", h.updateAllNodes)\n91\t\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/rebaseline-all\", h.rebaselineAllNodes)\n92\t\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/virtual\", h.addVirtualNode)\n93\t\tr.Put(\"/api/room\", h.updateRoom)\n94\t\t// System mode endpoints\n95\t\tr.Get(\"/api/mode\", h.getSystemMode)\n96\t\tr.Post(\"/api/mode\", h.setSystemMode)\n97\t\t// Export/Import endpoints\n98\t\tr.Get(\"/api/export\", h.exportConfig)\n99\t\tr.Post(\"/api/import\", h.importConfig)\n100\t}\n101\t\n102\tfunc (h *Handler) listNodes(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n103\t\tnodes, err := h.mgr.registry.GetAllNodes()\n104\t\tif err != nil {\n105\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n106\t\t\treturn\n107\t\t}\n108\t\tif nodes == nil {\n109\t\t\tnodes = []NodeRecord{}\n110\t\t}\n111\t\twriteJSON(w, nodes)\n112\t}\n113\t\n114\t// FleetNode represents extended node data for the fleet page.\n115\ttype FleetNode struct {\n116\t\tMAC             string  `json:\"mac\"`\n117\t\tName            string  `json:\"name\"`\n118\t\tLabel           string  `json:\"label\"`\n119\t\tRole            string  `json:\"role\"`\n120\t\tStatus          string  `json:\"status\"` // \"online\", \"offline\", \"updating\", \"unpaired\"\n121\t\tFirmwareVersion string  `json:\"firmware_version\"`\n122\t\tChipModel       string  `json:\"chip_model\"`\n123\t\tPosX            float64 `json:\"pos_x\"`\n124\t\tPosY            float64 `json:\"pos_y\"`\n125\t\tPosZ            float64 `json:\"pos_z\"`\n126\t\tVirtual         bool    `json:\"virtual\"`\n127\t\tManufacturer    string  `json:\"manufacturer,omitempty\"`\n128\t\tHealthScore     float64 `json:\"health_score\"`\n129\t\tUnpaired        bool    `json:\"unpaired,omitempty\"`\n130\t\t// Computed fields\n131\t\tLastSeenMS    int64   `json:\"last_seen_ms\"`\n132\t\tUptimeSeconds int64   `json:\"uptime_seconds\"`\n133\t\tPacketRate    float64 `json:\"packet_rate\"`\n134\t\tConfiguredRate int   `json:\"configured_rate\"`\n135\t\tTemperature   float64 `json:\"temperature\"`\n136\t\tOTAInProgress bool    `json:\"ota_in_progress\"`\n137\t}\n138\t\n139\t// fleetListResponse wraps the fleet list with migration window metadata.\n140\ttype fleetListResponse struct {\n141\t\tNodes                   []FleetNode `json:\"nodes\"`\n142\t\tMigrationWindowActive   bool        `json:\"migration_window_active\"`\n143\t\tMigrationDeadlineMS     int64       `json:\"migration_deadline_ms,omitempty\"`\n144\t\tMigrationRemainingSecs  float64     `json:\"migration_remaining_secs,omitempty\"`\n145\t}\n146\t\n147\t// listFleet returns extended node data with computed fields for the fleet page.\n148\tfunc (h *Handler) listFleet(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n149\t\tnodes, err := h.mgr.registry.GetAllNodes()\n150\t\tif err != nil {\n151\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n152\t\t\treturn\n153\t\t}\n154\t\tif nodes == nil {\n155\t\t\tnodes = []NodeRecord{}\n156\t\t}\n157\t\n158\t\t// Get connected MACs for status determination\n159\t\tvar connectedMACs []string\n160\t\tif h.nodeID != nil {\n161\t\t\tconnectedMACs = h.nodeID.GetConnectedMACs()\n162\t\t}\n163\t\tconnectedSet := make(map[string]bool)\n164\t\tfor _, mac := range connectedMACs {\n165\t\t\tconnectedSet[mac] = true\n166\t\t}\n167\t\n168\t\t// Get unpaired MACs (nodes connected without valid tokens)\n169\t\tunpairedSet := make(map[string]bool)\n170\t\tif h.nodeID != nil {\n171\t\t\tfor _, mac := range h.nodeID.GetUnpairedMACs() {\n172\t\t\t\tunpairedSet[mac] = true\n173\t\t\t}\n174\t\t}\n175\t\n176\t\t// Get OTA progress if OTA manager is available\n177\t\tvar otaProgress map[string]ota.NodeOTAProgress\n178\t\tif h.otaMgr != nil {\n179\t\t\totaProgress = h.otaMgr.GetProgress()\n180\t\t}\n181\t\n182\t\t// Convert to FleetNode with computed fields\n183\t\tfleetNodes := make([]FleetNode, 0, len(nodes))\n184\t\tnow := time.Now()\n185\t\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n186\t\t\tfleetNode := FleetNode{\n187\t\t\t\tMAC:             node.MAC,\n188\t\t\t\tName:            node.Name,\n189\t\t\t\tLabel:           node.Name, // Label is same as name\n190\t\t\t\tRole:            node.Role,\n191\t\t\t\tFirmwareVersion: node.FirmwareVersion,\n192\t\t\t\tChipModel:       node.ChipModel,\n193\t\t\t\tPosX:            node.PosX,\n194\t\t\t\tPosY:            node.PosY,\n195\t\t\t\tPosZ:            node.PosZ,\n196\t\t\t\tVirtual:         node.Virtual,\n197\t\t\t\tManufacturer:    node.Manufacturer,\n198\t\t\t\tHealthScore:     node.HealthScore,\n199\t\t\t\tLastSeenMS:      node.LastSeenAt.UnixMilli(),\n200\t\t\t\tConfiguredRate:  20, // Default configured rate\n201\t\t\t\tTemperature:     0,  // Not currently tracked\n202\t\t\t}\n203\t\n204\t\t\t// Check unpaired status first (highest priority visual indicator)\n205\t\t\tif unpairedSet[node.MAC] {\n206\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Unpaired = true\n207\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"unpaired\"\n208\t\t\t}\n209\t\n210\t\t\t// Determine status - check OTA progress first (skip if already unpaired)\n211\t\t\tif !fleetNode.Unpaired && otaProgress != nil {\n212\t\t\t\tif progress, ok := otaProgress[node.MAC]; ok {\n213\t\t\t\t\t// Node has OTA progress - determine status from OTA state\n214\t\t\t\t\tswitch progress.State {\n215\t\t\t\t\tcase ota.OTAPending, ota.OTADownloading, ota.OTARebooting:\n216\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"updating\"\n217\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = true\n218\t\t\t\t\tcase ota.OTAFailed, ota.OTARollback:\n219\t\t\t\t\t\t// Failed or rollback - show as offline\n220\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n221\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n222\t\t\t\t\tcase ota.OTAVerified:\n223\t\t\t\t\t\t// Verified - check if currently connected\n224\t\t\t\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n225\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n226\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n227\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n228\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n229\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n230\t\t\t\t\tdefault:\n231\t\t\t\t\t\t// No active OTA - check connection status\n232\t\t\t\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n233\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n234\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n235\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n236\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n237\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n238\t\t\t\t\t}\n239\t\t\t\t} else {\n240\t\t\t\t\t// No OTA progress for this node - check connection status\n241\t\t\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n242\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n243\t\t\t\t\t} else if node.WentOfflineAt.IsZero() {\n244\t\t\t\t\t\t// Never seen online or still in initial state\n245\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n246\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n247\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n248\t\t\t\t\t}\n249\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n250\t\t\t\t}\n251\t\t\t} else if !fleetNode.Unpaired {\n252\t\t\t\t// No OTA manager - check connection status\n253\t\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n254\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n255\t\t\t\t} else if node.WentOfflineAt.IsZero() {\n256\t\t\t\t\t// Never seen online or still in initial state\n257\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n258\t\t\t\t} else {\n259\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n260\t\t\t\t}\n261\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n262\t\t\t}\n263\t\n264\t\t\t// Calculate uptime (time since first seen, approximated as last seen - first seen + current session)\n265\t\t\tif !node.FirstSeenAt.IsZero() && !node.LastSeenAt.IsZero() {\n266\t\t\t\t// Approximate uptime as time since first seen\n267\t\t\t\tfleetNode.UptimeSeconds = int64(now.Sub(node.FirstSeenAt).Seconds())\n268\t\t\t}\n269\t\n270\t\t\t// Packet rate - would need to be calculated from recent CSI data\n271\t\t\t// For now, use a reasonable default or calculate from health score\n272\t\t\tif fleetNode.Status == \"online\" && fleetNode.HealthScore > 0 {\n273\t\t\t\tfleetNode.PacketRate = fleetNode.HealthScore * 20 // Approximate based on health\n274\t\t\t}\n275\t\n276\t\t\tfleetNodes = append(fleetNodes, fleetNode)\n277\t\t}\n278\t\n279\t\t// Append unpaired nodes that are connected but not in the registry.\n280\t\tregisteredMACs := make(map[string]bool, len(fleetNodes))\n281\t\tfor _, n := range fleetNodes {\n282\t\t\tregisteredMACs[n.MAC] = true\n283\t\t}\n284\t\tfor mac := range unpairedSet {\n285\t\t\tif !registeredMACs[mac] {\n286\t\t\t\tfleetNodes = append(fleetNodes, FleetNode{\n287\t\t\t\t\tMAC:        mac,\n288\t\t\t\t\tStatus:     \"unpaired\",\n289\t\t\t\t\tUnpaired:   true,\n290\t\t\t\t\tRole:       \"rx\",\n291\t\t\t\t\tLastSeenMS: now.UnixMilli(),\n292\t\t\t\t})\n293\t\t\t}\n294\t\t}\n295\t\n296\t\t// Build response with migration window metadata.\n297\t\tresp := fleetListResponse{\n298\t\t\tNodes: fleetNodes,\n299\t\t}\n300\t\tif h.migProvider != nil {\n301\t\t\tdeadline := h.migProvider.GetMigrationDeadline()\n302\t\t\tif !deadline.IsZero() {\n303\t\t\t\tresp.MigrationDeadlineMS = deadline.UnixMilli()\n304\t\t\t\tremaining := time.Until(deadline).Seconds()\n305\t\t\t\tif remaining > 0 {\n306\t\t\t\t\tresp.MigrationWindowActive = true\n307\t\t\t\t\tresp.MigrationRemainingSecs = remaining\n308\t\t\t\t}\n309\t\t\t}\n310\t\t}\n311\t\n312\t\twriteJSON(w, resp)\n313\t}\n314\t\n315\tfunc (h *Handler) getNode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n316\t\tmac := chi.URLParam(r, \"mac\")\n317\t\tnode, err := h.mgr.registry.GetNode(mac)\n318\t\tif errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n319\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"node not found\", http.StatusNotFound)\n320\t\t\treturn\n321\t\t}\n322\t\tif err != nil {\n323\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n324\t\t\treturn\n325\t\t}\n326\t\twriteJSON(w, node)\n327\t}\n328\t\n329\tvar validRoles = map[string]bool{\n330\t\t\"tx\": true, \"rx\": true, \"tx_rx\": true, \"passive\": true, \"virtual\": true,\n331\t}\n332\t\n333\ttype setRoleRequest struct {\n334\t\tRole string `json:\"role\"`\n335\t}\n336\t\n337\tfunc (h *Handler) setNodeRole(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n338\t\tmac := chi.URLParam(r, \"mac\")\n339\t\n340\t\t// Verify node exists.\n341\t\tif _, err := h.mgr.registry.GetNode(mac); errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n342\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"node not found\", http.StatusNotFound)\n343\t\t\treturn\n344\t\t} else if err != nil {\n345\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n346\t\t\treturn\n347\t\t}\n348\t\n349\t\tvar req setRoleRequest\n350\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); http.StatusInternalServerError)\n367\t\t\treturn\n368\t\t}\n369\t\twriteJSON(w, node)\n370\t}\n371\t\n372\t// ── position / virtual / room endpoints ──────────────────────────────────────\n373\t\n374\ttype updatePositionRequest struct {\n375\t\tX float64 `json:\"x\"`\n376\t\tY float64 `json:\"y\"`\n377\t\tZ float64 `json:\"z\"`\n378\t}\n379\t\n380\tfunc (h *Handler) updateNodePosition(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n381\t\tmac := chi.URLParam(r, \"mac\")\n382\t\tvar req {\n428\t\tDurationMS int `json:\"duration_ms\"`\n429\t}\n430\t\n431\tfunc (h *Handler) identifyNode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n432\t\tmac := chi.URLParam(r, \"mac\")\n433\t\n434\t\t// Verify node exists.\n435\t\tif _, err := h.mgr.registry.GetNode(mac); errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n436\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"node not found\", http.StatusNotFound)\n437\t\t\treturn\n438\t\t} else if err != nil {\n439\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n440\t\t\treturn\n441\t\t}\n442\t\n443\t\t// Parse request body.\n444\t\tvar req identifyNodeRequest\n445\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n446\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"invalid request body\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n447\t\t\treturn\n448\t\t}\n449\t\n450\t\t// Default to 5000ms if not specified.\n451\t\tdurationMS := req.DurationMS\n452\t\tif durationMS <= 0 {\n453\t\t\tdurationMS = 5000\n454\t\t}\n455\t\n456\t\t// Send identify command if node identifier is available.\n457\t\tif h.nodeID != nil {\n458\t\t\tif !h.nodeID.SendIdentifyToMAC(mac, durationMS) {\n459\t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"node not connected\", http.StatusNotFound)\n460\t\t\t\treturn\n461\t\t\t}\n462\t\t}\n463\t\n464\t\twriteJSON(w, map[string]bool{\"ok\": true})\n465\t}\n466\t\n467\tfunc (h *Handler) rebootNode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n468\t\tmac := chi.URLParam(r, \"mac\")\n469\t\n470\t\t// Verify node exists.\n471\t\tif _, err := h.mgr.registry.GetNode(mac); errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n472\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"node not found\", http.StatusNotFound)\n473\t\t\treturn\n474\t\t} else if err != nil {\n475\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n476\t\t\treturn\n477\t\t}\n478\t\n479\t\t// Parse request body for optional delay.\n480\t\tvar req struct {\n481\t\t\tDelayMS int `json:\"delay_ms\"`\n482\t\t}\n483\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil && err.Error() != \"EOF\" {\n484\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"invalid request body\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n485\t\t\treturn\n486\t\t}\n487\t\n488\t\tdelayMS := req.DelayMS\n489\t\tif delayMS <= 0 {\n490\t\t\tdelayMS = 1000 // Default 1 second delay\n491\t\t}\n492\t\n493\t\t// Send reboot command if node identifier is available.\n494\t\tif h.nodeID != nil {\n495\t\t\tif !h.nodeID.SendRebootToMAC(mac, delayMS) {\n496\t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"node not connected\", http.StatusNotFound)\n497\t\t\t\treturn\n498\t\t\t}\n499\t\t}\n500\t\n501\t\twriteJSON(w, map[string]bool{\"ok\": true})\n502\t}\n503\t\n504\tfunc (h *Handler) updateAllNodes(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n505\t\t// Trigger rolling update with 30-second stagger (if OTA manager is configured)\n506\t\tif h.otaMgr != nil {\n507\t\t\tgo func() {\n508\t\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 30*time.Minute)\n509\t\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n510\t\n511\t\t\t\tif err := h.otaMgr.SendOTAAll(ctx, 30*time.Second); err != nil {\n512\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ERROR] fleet: updateAllNodes failed: %v\", err)\n513\t\t\t\t}\n514\t\t\t}()\n515\t\t}\n516\t\n517\t\t// Return immediately with the count of nodes that will be updated\n518\t\tvar count int\n519\t\tif h.nodeID != nil {\n520\t\t\tmacs := h.nodeID.GetConnectedMACs()\n521\t\t\tcount = len(macs)\n522\t\t}\n523\t\n524\t\twriteJSON(w, map[string]interface{}{\n525\t\t\t\"ok\":    true,\n526\t\t\t\"count\": count,\n527\t\t})\n528\t}\n529\t\n530\tfunc (h *Handler) rebaselineAllNodes(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n531\t\t// This is a placeholder - the actual baseline manager would handle this\n532\t\t// For now, return a success response\n533\t\twriteJSON(w, map[string]interface{}{\n534\t\t\t\"ok\":    true,\n535\t\t\t\"count\": 0,\n536\t\t})\n537\t}\n538\t\n539\tfunc (h *Handler) exportConfig(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n540\t\t// Collect all configuration data\n541\t\tnodes, err := h.mgr.registry.GetAllNodes()\n542\t\tif err != nil {\n543\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"failed to get nodes\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n544\t\t\treturn\n545\t\t}\n546\t\n547\t\tconfig := map[string]interface{}{\n548\t\t\t\"version\":    1,\n549\t\t\t\"exported_at\": time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339),\n550\t\t\t\"nodes\":      nodes,\n551\t\t}\n552\t\n553\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n554\t\tif err := json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(config); err != nil {\n555\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"failed to encode h.importConfig)\n}\n\nfunc (h *Handler) listNodes(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tnodes, err := h.mgr.registry.GetAllNodes()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tif nodes == nil {\n\t\tnodes = []NodeRecord{}\n\t}\n\twriteJSON(w, nodes)\n}\n\n// FleetNode represents extended node data for the fleet page.\ntype FleetNode struct {\n\tMAC             string  `json:\"mac\"`\n\tName            string  `json:\"name\"`\n\tLabel           string  `json:\"label\"`\n\tRole            string  `json:\"role\"`\n\tStatus          string  `json:\"status\"` // \"online\", \"offline\", \"updating\", \"unpaired\"\n\tFirmwareVersion string  `json:\"firmware_version\"`\n\tChipModel       string `json:\"configured_rate\"`\n\tTemperature   float64 `json:\"temperature\"`\n\tOTAInProgress bool    `json:\"ota_in_progress\"`\n}\n\n// fleetListResponse wraps the fleet list with migration window metadata.\ntype fleetListResponse struct {\n\tNodes                   []FleetNode `json:\"nodes\"`\n\tMigrationWindowActive   bool        `json:\"migration_window_active\"`\n\tMigrationDeadlineMS fields for the fleet page.\nfunc (h *Handler) listFleet(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tnodes, err := h.mgr.registry.GetAllNodes()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tif nodes == nil {\n\t\tnodes = []NodeRecord{}\n\t}\n\n\t// Get connected MACs for status determination\n\tvar connectedMACs []string\n\tif h.nodeID != nil {\n\t\tconnectedMACs = h.nodeID.GetConnectedMACs()\n\t}\n\tconnectedSet := make(map[string]bool)\n\tfor _, mac := range connectedMACs {\n\t\tconnectedSet[mac] = true\n\t}\n\n\t// Get unpaired MACs (nodes connected without valid tokens)\n\tunpairedSet := make(map[string]bool)\n\tif h.nodeID != nil {\n\t\tfor _, mac := range h.nodeID.GetUnpairedMACs() {\n\t\t\tunpairedSet[mac] = true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Get OTA progress if OTA manager is available\n\tvar otaProgress map[string]ota.NodeOTAProgress\n\tif h.otaMgr != nil {\n\t\totaProgress = h.otaMgr.GetProgress()\n\t}\n\n\t// Convert to FleetNode with computed fields\n\tfleetNodes := make([]FleetNode, 0, len(nodes))\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n\t\tfleetNode := FleetNode{\n\t\t\tMAC:             node.MAC,\n\t\t\tName:            node.Name,\n\t\t\tLabel:           node.Name, // Label is same as name\n\t\t\tRole:            node.Role,\n\t\t\tFirmwareVersion: node.FirmwareVersion,\n\t\t\tChipModel:       node.ChipModel,\n\t\t\tPosX:            node.PosX,\n\t\t\tPosY:            node.PosY,\n\t\t\tPosZ:            node.PosZ,\n\t\t\tVirtual:         node.Virtual,\n\t\t\tManufacturer:    node.Manufacturer,\n\t\t\tHealthScore:     node.HealthScore,\n\t\t\tLastSeenMS:      node.LastSeenAt.UnixMilli(),\n\t\t\tConfiguredRate:  20, // Default configured rate\n\t\t\tTemperature:     0,  // Not currently tracked\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Check unpaired status first (highest priority visual indicator)\n\t\tif unpairedSet[node.MAC] {\n\t\t\tfleetNode.Unpaired = true\n\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"unpaired\"\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Determine status - check OTA progress first (skip if already unpaired)\n\t\tif !fleetNode.Unpaired && otaProgress != nil {\n\t\t\tif progress, ok := otaProgress[node.MAC]; ok {\n\t\t\t\t// Node has OTA progress - determine status from OTA state\n\t\t\t\tswitch progress.State {\n\t\t\t\tcase ota.OTAPending, ota.OTADownloading, ota.OTARebooting:\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"updating\"\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = true\n\t\t\t\tcase ota.OTAFailed, ota.OTARollback:\n\t\t\t\t\t// Failed or rollback - show as offline\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n\t\t\t\tcase ota.OTAVerified:\n\t\t\t\t\t// Verified - check if currently connected\n\t\t\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n\t\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t\t// No active OTA - check connection status\n\t\t\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t// No OTA progress for this node - check connection status\n\t\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n\t\t\t\t} else if node.WentOfflineAt.IsZero() {\n\t\t\t\t\t// Never seen online or still in initial state\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if !fleetNode.Unpaired {\n\t\t\t// No OTA manager - check connection status\n\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n\t\t\t} else if node.WentOfflineAt.IsZero() {\n\t\t\t\t// Never seen online or still in initial state\n\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Calculate uptime (time since first seen, approximated as last seen - first seen + current session)\n\t\tif !node.FirstSeenAt.IsZero() && !node.LastSeenAt.IsZero() {\n\t\t\t// Approximate uptime as time since first seen\n\t\t\tfleetNode.UptimeSeconds = int64(now.Sub(node.FirstSeenAt).Seconds())\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Packet rate - would need to be calculated from recent CSI data\n\t\t// For now, use a reasonable default or calculate from health score\n\t\tif fleetNode.Status == \"online\" && fleetNode.HealthScore > 0 {\n\t\t\tfleetNode.PacketRate = fleetNode.HealthScore * 20 // Approximate based on health\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfleetNodes = append(fleetNodes, fleetNode)\n\t}\n\n\t// Append unpaired nodes that are connected but not in the registry.\n\tregisteredMACs := make(map[string]bool, len(fleetNodes))\n\tfor _, n := range fleetNodes {\n\t\tregisteredMACs[n.MAC] = true\n\t}\n\tfor mac := range unpairedSet {\n\t\tif !registeredMACs[mac] {\n\t\t\tfleetNodes = append(fleetNodes, FleetNode{\n\t\t\t\tMAC:        mac,\n\t\t\t\tStatus:     \"unpaired\",\n\t\t\t\tUnpaired:   true,\n\t\t\t\tRole:       \"rx\",\n\t\t\t\tLastSeenMS: now.UnixMilli(),\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Build response with migration window metadata.\n\tresp := fleetListResponse{\n\t\tNodes: fleetNodes,\n\t}\n\tif h.migProvider != nil {\n\t\tdeadline := h.migProvider.GetMigrationDeadline()\n\t\tif !deadline.IsZero() {\n\t\t\tresp.MigrationDeadlineMS = deadline.UnixMilli()\n\t\t\tremaining := time.Until(deadline).Seconds()\n\t\t\tif remaining > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tresp.MigrationWindowActive = true\n\t\t\t\tresp.MigrationRemainingSecs = remaining\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\twriteJSON(w, resp)\n}\n\nfunc (h *Handler) getNode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tmac := chi.URLParam(r, \"mac\")\n\tnode, err := h.mgr.registry.GetNode(mac)\n\tif errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"node not found\", http.StatusNotFound)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\twriteJSON(w, node)\n}\n\nvar validRoles = map[string]bool{\n\t\"tx\": true, \"rx\": true, \"tx_rx\": true, \"passive\": true, \"virtual\": true,\n}\n\ntype setRoleRequest struct {\n\tRole string `json:\"role\"`\n}\n\nfunc (h *Handler) setNodeRole(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tmac := chi.URLParam(r, \"mac\")\n\n\t// Verify node exists.\n\tif _, err := h.mgr.registry.GetNode(mac); errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"node not found\", http.StatusNotFound)\n\t\treturn\n\t} else if err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tvar req setRoleRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil || req.Role == \"\" {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"invalid request body\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tif !validRoles[req.Role] {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"invalid role\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif err := h.mgr.OverrideRole(mac, req.Role); err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", (\n4\t\t\"sync\"\n5\t\t\"time\"\n6\t)\n7\t\n8\t// Baseline configuration constants\n9\tconst (\n10\t\tDefaultBaselineTimeConstant = 30.0       // seconds\n11\t\tDefaultMotionThreshold      = 0.05       // deltaRMS threshold for motion gating\n12\t\tDefaultAlpha                = 0.0033     // dt / (tau + dt) for dt=0.1s, tau=30s\n13\t\tBaselineConfidenceMin       = 0.3        // Minimum confidence Initialize(amplitude []float64) {\n38\t\tb.mu.Lock()\n39\t\tdefer b.mu.Unlock()\n40\t\n41\t\tcopy(b.Values, amplitude)\n42\t\tb.Initialized = true\n43\t\tb.SampleCount = 1\n44\t\tb.LastUpdate = time.Now()\n45\t\tb.Confidence = 1.0 // Fresh initialization = full confidence\n46\t}\n47\t\n48\t// Update performs EMA update with motion gating\n49\t// Only updates if smoothDeltaRMS is below the motion threshold\n50\t// alpha = dt / (tau + dt), typically ~0.0033 for dt=0.1s, tau=30s\n51\tfunc (b *BaselineState) Update(amplitude []float64, smoothDeltaRMS float64, alpha float64) bool {\n52\t\tb.mu.Lock()\n53\t\tdefer b.mu.Unlock()\n54\t\n55\t\t// Motion-gated update: only update when room is still\n56\t\tif smoothDeltaRMS >= DefaultMotionThreshold {\n57\t\t\treturn false\n58\t\t}\n59\t\n60\t\t// Update EMA for each subcarrier\n61\t\tfor k := 0; k < len(b.Values) && k < len(amplitude); k++ {\n62\t\t\tb.Values[k] = alpha*amplitude[k] + (1-alpha)*b.Values[k]\n63\t\t}\n64\t\n65\t\tb.SampleCount++\n66\t\tb.LastUpdate = time.Now()\n67\t\n68\t\t// Increase confidence as we accumulate quiet-room samples\n69\t\t// Confidence asymptotically approaches 1.0\n70\t\tif b.Confidence < 1.0 {\n71\t\t\tb.Confidence = b.Confidence + (1.0-b.Confidence)*0.01\n72\t\t\tif b.Confidence > 1.0 {\n73\t\t\t\tb.Confidence = 1.0\n74\t\t\t}\n75\t\t}\n76\t\n77\t\treturn true\n78\t}\n79\t\n80\t// Get returns a copy of the current baseline values\n81\tfunc (b *BaselineState) Get() []float64 {\n82\t\tb.mu.RLock()\n83\t\tdefer b.mu.RUnlock()\n84\t\n85\t\tresult := make([]float64, len(b.Values))\n86\t\tcopy(result, b.Values)\n87\t\treturn result\n88\t}\n89\t\n90\t// IsInitialized returns whether the baseline has been initialized\n91\tfunc (b *BaselineState) IsInitialized() bool {\n92\t\tb.mu.RLock()\n93\t\tdefer b.mu.RUnlock()\n94\t\treturn b.Initialized\n95\t}\n96\t\n97\t// GetConfidence returns the current baseline confidence\n98\tfunc (b *BaselineState) GetConfidence() float64 {\n99\t\tb.mu.RLock()\n100\t\tdefer b.mu.RUnlock()\n101\t\treturn b.Confidence\n102\t}\n103\t\n104\t// RestoreFromSnapshot restores baseline from a persisted snapshot\n105\t// Sets confidence to minimum if snapshot is stale (>7 days old)\n106\tfunc (b *BaselineState) RestoreFromSnapshot(values []float64, snapshotTime time.Time) {\n107\t\tb.mu.Lock()\n108\t\tdefer b.mu.Unlock()\n109\t\n110\t\tcopy(b.Values, values)\n111\t\tb.Initialized = true\n112\t\tb.LastUpdate = snapshotTime\n113\t\n114\t\t// Check staleness\n115\t\tage := time.Since(snapshotTime)\n116\t\tif age > BaselineStaleDays*24*time.Hour {\n117\t\t\tb.Confidence = BaselineConfidenceMin\n118\t\t} else {\n119\t\t\t// Confidence degrades with age\n120\t\t\tageFraction := float64(age) / float64(BaselineStaleDays*24*time.Hour)\n121\t\t\tb.Confidence = 1.0 - ageFraction*0.7 // Range from 0.3 to 1.0\n122\t\t}\n123\t}\n124\t\n125\t// Snapshot returns a snapshot of the baseline for persistence\n126\ttype BaselineSnapshot struct {\n127\t\tValues     []float64\n128\t\tSampleTime time.Time\n129\t\tConfidence b.LastUpdate,\n143\t\t\tConfidence: b.Confidence,\n144\t\t}\n145\t}\n146\t\n147\t// Reset clears the baseline (for manual re-baseline or node position change)\n148\tfunc (b *BaselineState) Reset() {\n149\t\tb.mu.Lock()\n150\t\tdefer b.mu.Unlock()\n151\t\n152\t\tfor i := range b.Values {\n153\t\t\tb.Values[i] = 0\n154\t\t}\n155\t\tb.Initialized = false\n156\t\tb.SampleCount = 0\n157\t\tb.Confidence = 0.0\n158\t}\n159\t\n160\t// BaselineManager manages baselines for all links\n161\ttype BaselineManager struct {\n162\t\tmu     sync.RWMutex\n163\t\tbaselines *BaselineManager {\n169\t\treturn &BaselineManager{\n170\t\t\tbaselines: make(map[string]*BaselineState),\n171\t\t\tnSub:      nSub,\n172\t\t}\n173\t}\n174\t\n175\t// GetOrCreate returns the baseline state for a link, creating if needed\n176\tfunc (bm *BaselineManager) GetOrCreate(linkID string) *BaselineState {\n177\t\tbm.mu.Lock()\n178\t\tdefer bm.mu.Unlock()\n179\t\n180\t\tif bs, exists := bm.baselines[linkID]; exists {\n181\t\t\treturn bs\n182\t\t}\n183\t\n184\t\tbs := NewBaselineState(bm.nSub)\n185\t\tbm.baselines[linkID] = bs\n186\t\treturn bs\n187\t}\n188\t\n189\t// Get returns the baseline state for a link, or nil if not exists\n190\tfunc (bm *BaselineManager) Get(linkID string) *BaselineState {\n191\t\tbm.mu.RLock()\n192\t\tdefer bm.mu.RUnlock()\n193\t\treturn bm.baselines[linkID]\n194\t}\n195\t\n196\t// GetAllSnapshots returns snapshots of all baselines for persistence\n197\tfunc (bm *BaselineManager) GetAllSnapshots() map[string]*BaselineSnapshot {\n198\t\tbm.mu.RLock()\n199\t\tdefer bm.mu.RUnlock()\n200\t\n201\t\tresult := make(map[string]*BaselineSnapshot)\n202\t\tfor linkID, state := range bm.baselines {\n203\t\t\tif state.IsInitialized() signal\n\nimport (\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n)\n\n// Baseline configuration constants\nconst (\n\tDefaultBaselineTimeConstant = 30.0       // seconds\n\tDefaultMotionThreshold      = 0.05       // deltaRMS threshold for motion gating\n\tDefaultAlpha                = 0.0033     // dt / (tau + dt) for dt=0.1s, tau=30s\n\tBaselineConfidenceMin       = 0.3        // Minimum confidence for stale baselines\n\tBaselineStaleDays           = 7          // Days before baseline is considered stale\n)\n\n// BaselineState holds the EMA baseline for a single link\ntype BaselineState struct {\n\tmu           sync.RWMutex\n\tValues       []float64 // Per-subcarrier baseline amplitude\n\tInitialized  bool      // True if baseline has been set\n\tSampleCount  int       // Number of samples used to train baseline\n\tLastUpdate   time.Time // Time of last baseline update\n\tConfidence   float64   // 0-1 confidence in the baseline\n}\n\n// NewBaselineState creates a new baseline state\nfunc NewBaselineState(nSub int) *BaselineState {\n\treturn &BaselineState{\n\t\tValues:      make([]float64, nSub),\n\t\tInitialized: false,\n\t\tConfidence:  0.0,\n\t}\n}\n\n// Initialize sets the baseline to the first amplitude sample\nfunc (b *BaselineState) Initialize(amplitude []float64) {\n\tb.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer b.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tcopy(b.Values, amplitude)\n\tb.Initialized = true\n\tb.SampleCount = 1\n\tb.LastUpdate = time.Now()\n\tb.Confidence = 1.0 // Fresh initialization = full confidence\n}\n\n// Update performs EMA update with motion gating\n// Only updates if smoothDeltaRMS is below the motion threshold\n// alpha = dt / (tau + dt), typically ~0.0033 for dt=0.1s, tau=30s\nfunc (b *BaselineState) Update(amplitude []float64, smoothDeltaRMS float64, alpha float64) bool {\n\tb.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer b.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t// Motion-gated update: only update when room is still\n\tif smoothDeltaRMS >= DefaultMotionThreshold {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\t// Update EMA for each subcarrier\n\tfor k := 0; k < len(b.Values) && k < len(amplitude); k++ {\n\t\tb.Values[k] = alpha*amplitude[k] + (1-alpha)*b.Values[k]\n\t}\n\n\tb.SampleCount++\n\tb.LastUpdate = time.Now()\n\n\t// Increase confidence as we accumulate quiet-room samples\n\t// Confidence asymptotically approaches 1.0\n\tif b.Confidence < 1.0 {\n\t\tb.Confidence = b.Confidence + (1.0-b.Confidence)*0.01\n\t\tif b.Confidence > 1.0 {\n\t\t\tb.Confidence = 1.0\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn true\n}\n\n// Get returns a copy of the current baseline values\nfunc (b *BaselineState) Get() []float64 {\n\tb.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer b.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tresult := make([]float64, len(b.Values))\n\tcopy(result, b.Values)\n\treturn result\n}\n\n// IsInitialized returns whether the baseline has been initialized\nfunc (b *BaselineState) IsInitialized() bool {\n\tb.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer b.mu.RUnlock()\n\treturn b.Initialized\n}\n\n// GetConfidence returns the current baseline confidence\nfunc (b *BaselineState) GetConfidence() float64 {\n\tb.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer b.mu.RUnlock()\n\treturn b.Confidence\n}\n\n// RestoreFromSnapshot restores baseline from a persisted snapshot\n// Sets confidence to minimum if snapshot is stale (>7 days old)\nfunc (b *BaselineState) RestoreFromSnapshot(values []float64, snapshotTime time.Time) {\n\tb.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer b.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tcopy(b.Values, values)\n\tb.Initialized = true\n\tb.LastUpdate = snapshotTime\n\n\t// Check staleness\n\tage := time.Since(snapshotTime)\n\tif age > BaselineStaleDays*24*time.Hour {\n\t\tb.Confidence = BaselineConfidenceMin\n\t} else {\n\t\t// Confidence degrades with age\n\t\tageFraction := float64(age) / float64(BaselineStaleDays*24*time.Hour)\n\t\tb.Confidence = 1.0 - ageFraction*0.7 // Range from 0.3 to 1.0\n\t}\n}\n\n// Snapshot returns a snapshot of the baseline for persistence\ntype BaselineSnapshot struct {\n\tValues     []float64\n\tSampleTime time.Time\n\tConfidence float64\n}\n\n// GetSnapshot returns a snapshot for persistence\nfunc (b *BaselineState) GetSnapshot() *BaselineSnapshot {\n\tb.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer b.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tvalues := make([]float64, len(b.Values))\n\tcopy(values, b.Values)\n\n\treturn &BaselineSnapshot{\n\t\tValues:     values,\n\t\tSampleTime: b.LastUpdate,\n\t\tConfidence: b.Confidence,\n\t}\n}\n\n// Reset clears the baseline (for manual re-baseline or node position change)\nfunc (b *BaselineState) Reset() {\n\tb.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer b.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tfor i := range b.Values {\n\t\tb.Values[i] = 0\n\t}\n\tb.Initialized = false\n\tb.SampleCount = 0\n\tb.Confidence = 0.0\n}\n\n// BaselineManager manages baselines for all links\ntype BaselineManager struct {\n\tmu     sync.RWMutex\n\tbaselines map[string]*BaselineState // keyed by linkID (nodeMAC:peerMAC)\n\tnSub     int\n}\n\n// NewBaselineManager creates a new baseline manager\nfunc NewBaselineManager(nSub int) *BaselineManager {\n\treturn &BaselineManager{\n\t\tbaselines: make(map[string]*BaselineState),\n\t\tnSub:      nSub,\n\t}\n}\n\n// GetOrCreate returns the baseline state for a link, creating if needed\nfunc (bm *BaselineManager) GetOrCreate(linkID string) *BaselineState {\n\tbm.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer bm.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tif bs, exists := bm.baselines[linkID]; exists {\n\t\treturn bs\n\t}\n\n\tbs := NewBaselineState(bm.nSub)\n\tbm.baselines[linkID] = bs\n\treturn bs\n}\n\n// Get returns the baseline state for a link, or nil if not exists\nfunc (bm *BaselineManager) Get(linkID string) *BaselineState {\n\tbm.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer bm.mu.RUnlock()\n\treturn bm.baselines[linkID]\n}\n\n// GetAllSnapshots returns snapshots of all baselines for persistence\nfunc (bm *BaselineManager) GetAllSnapshots() map[string]*BaselineSnapshot {\n\tbm.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer bm.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tresult := make(map[string]*BaselineSnapshot)\n\tfor linkID, state := range bm.baselines {\n\t\tif state.IsInitialized() {\n\t\t\tresult[linkID] = state.GetSnapshot()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn result\n}\n\n// Remove removes a baseline for a link\nfunc (bm *BaselineManager) Remove(linkID string) {\n\tbm.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer bm.mu.Unlock()\n\tdelete(bm.baselines, linkID)\n}\n\n// LinkCount returns the number of tracked links\nfunc (bm *BaselineManager) LinkCount() int {\n\tbm.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer bm.mu.RUnlock()\n\treturn len(bm.baselines)\n}\n","numLines":223,"startLine":1,"totalLines":223}}}

cfg.TLS {\n\t\topts.SetTLSConfig(&tls.Config{\n\t\t\tInsecureSkipVerify: true, // Allow self-signed certs\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\t// Set Last Will and Testament for availability\n\tlwtTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/availability\", cfg.TopicPrefix)\n\topts.SetBinaryWill(lwtTopic, []byte(\"offline\"), 1, true)\n\n\topts.OnConnect = func(client mqtt.Client) {\n\t\tc.mu.Lock()\n\t\tc.connected = true\n\t\tcb := c.onConnect\n\t\tc.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] MQTT connected to %s\", cfg.Broker)\n\n\t\t// Publish online status\n\t\tif err := c.PublishRetained(lwtTopic, []byte(\"online\")); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to publish availability: %v\", err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Publish discovery configs on reconnect\n\t\tif cfg.DiscoveryEnabled {\n\t\t\tgo c.publishAllDiscoveryConfigs()\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif cb != nil {\n\t\t\tgo cb()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\topts.SetConnectionLostHandler(func(client mqtt.Client, err error) {\n\t\tc.mu.Lock()\n\t\tc.connected = false\n\t\tcb := c.onDisconnect\n\t\tc.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] MQTT disconnected: %v\", err)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] MQTT disconnected\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif cb != nil {\n\t\t\tgo cb()\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tc.client = mqtt.NewClient(opts)\n\treturn c, nil\n}\n\n// Connect establishes connection to MQTT broker.\nfunc (c *Client) Connect(ctx context.Context) error {\n\ttoken := c.client.Connect()\n\tif !token.WaitTimeout(c.config.ConnectTimeout) {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"MQTT connection timeout\")\n\t}\n\tif err := token.Error(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"MQTT connect failed: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// Disconnect closes the MQTT connection.\nfunc (c *Client) Disconnect() {\n\tc.client.Disconnect(250) // 250ms grace period\n\tc.mu.Lock()\n\tc.connected = false\n\tc.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// IsConnected returns true if connected to broker.\nfunc (c *Client) IsConnected() bool {\n\tc.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer c.mu.RUnlock()\n\treturn c.connected\n}\n\n// SetOnConnect sets callback for connection events.\nfunc (c *Client) SetOnConnect(cb func()) {\n\tc.mu.Lock()\n\tc.onConnect = cb\n\tc.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetOnDisconnect sets callback for disconnection events.\nfunc (c *Client) SetOnDisconnect(cb func()) {\n\tc.mu.Lock()\n\tc.onDisconnect = cb\n\tc.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// Publish publishes a message to a topic.\nfunc (c *Client) Publish(topic string, payload []byte) error {\n\tc.mu.RLock()\n\tconnected := c.connected\n\tc.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif !connected {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"MQTT not connected\")\n\t}\n\n\ttoken := c.client.Publish(topic, 1, false, payload)\n\tif token.Wait() && token.Error() != nil {\n\t\treturn token.Error()\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// PublishRetained publishes a retained message.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishRetained(topic string, payload []byte) error {\n\tc.mu.RLock()\n\tconnected := c.connected\n\tc.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif !connected {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"MQTT not connected\")\n\t}\n\n\ttoken := c.client.Publish(topic, 1, true, payload)\n\tif token.Wait() && token.Error() != nil {\n\t\treturn token.Error()\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// Subscribe subscribes to a topic.\nfunc (c *Client) Subscribe(topic string, handler func(topic string, payload []byte)) error {\n\tc.mu.RLock()\n\tconnected := c.connected\n\tc.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif !connected {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"MQTT not connected\")\n\t}\n\n\ttoken := c.client.Subscribe(topic, 1, func(client mqtt.Client, msg mqtt.Message) {\n\t\thandler(msg.Topic(), msg.Payload())\n\t})\n\tif token.Wait() && token.Error() != nil {\n\t\treturn token.Error()\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// ─── Home Assistant Auto-Discovery ─────────────────────────────────────────\n\n// PublishDeviceTracker publishes a device tracker for a person.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishDeviceTracker(personID, personName string) error {\n\tif !c.config.DiscoveryEnabled {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tentityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s\", personID)\n\tconfigTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/device_tracker/%s/config\", c.config.DiscoveryPrefix, entityID)\n\tstateTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel/person/%s/state\", personID)\n\n\tconfig := HADiscoveryConfig{\n\t\tUniqueID:   entityID,\n\t\tName:       personName,\n\t\tStateTopic: stateTopic,\n\t\tJSONAttributesTopic: stateTopic,\n\t\tDevice:     c.spaxelDevice,\n\t\tIcon:       \"mdi:account\",\n\t}\n\n\tpayload, _ := json.Marshal(config)\n\n\tif err := c.PublishRetained(configTopic, payload); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tc.mu.Lock()\n\tc.publishedEntities[entityID] = true\n\tc.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] MQTT: Published device_tracker.%s for %s\", entityID, personName)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// UpdatePersonState updates a person's location state.\nfunc (c *Client) UpdatePersonState(personID string, state string, attributes map[string]interface{}) error {\n\tstateTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel/person/%s/state\", personID)\n\n\tpayload := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"state\": state, // home, away, not_home\n\t}\n\tfor k, v := range attributes {\n\t\tpayload[k] = v\n\t}\n\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(payload)\n\treturn c.Publish(stateTopic, data)\n}\n\n// PublishBinarySensor publishes a binary sensor (e.g., motion, fall detected).\nfunc (c *Client) PublishBinarySensor(sensorID, name, deviceClass string) error {\n\tif !c.config.DiscoveryEnabled {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tentityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s\", sensorID)\n\tconfigTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/binary_sensor/%s/config\", c.config.DiscoveryPrefix, entityID)\n\tstateTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel/sensor/%s/state\", sensorID)\n\n\tconfig := HADiscoveryConfig{\n\t\tUniqueID:    entityID,\n\t\tName:        name,\n\t\tDeviceClass: deviceClass,\n\t\tStateTopic:  stateTopic,\n\t\tPayloadOn:   \"ON\",\n\t\tPayloadOff:  \"OFF\",\n\t\tDevice:      c.spaxelDevice,\n\t}\n\n\tpayload, _ := json.Marshal(config)\n\n\tif err := c.PublishRetained(configTopic, payload); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tc.mu.Lock()\n\tc.publishedEntities[entityID] = true\n\tc.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] MQTT: Published binary_sensor.%s\", entityID)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// UpdateBinarySensorState updates a binary sensor state.\nfunc (c *Client) UpdateBinarySensorState(sensorID string, on bool) error {\n\tstateTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel/sensor/%s/state\", sensorID)\n\n\tstate := \"OFF\"\n\tif on {\n\t\tstate = \"ON\"\n\t}\n\n\treturn c.Publish(stateTopic, []byte(state))\n}\n\n// PublishSensor publishes a sensor entity.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishSensor(sensorID, name, deviceClass, unit string) error {\n\tif !c.config.DiscoveryEnabled {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tentityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s\", sensorID)\n\tconfigTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/sensor/%s/config\", c.config.DiscoveryPrefix, entityID)\n\tstateTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel/sensor/%s/state\", sensorID)\n\n\tconfig := HADiscoveryConfig{\n\t\tUniqueID:      entityID,\n\t\tName:          name,\n\t\tDeviceClass:   deviceClass,\n\t\tUnitOfMeasure: unit,\n\t\tStateTopic:    stateTopic,\n\t\tDevice:        c.spaxelDevice,\n\t}\n\n\tpayload, _ := json.Marshal(config)\n\n\tif err := c.PublishRetained(configTopic, payload); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tc.mu.Lock()\n\tc.publishedEntities[entityID] = true\n\tc.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] MQTT: Published sensor.%s\", entityID)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// UpdateSensorState updates a sensor's state.\nfunc (c *Client) UpdateSensorState(sensorID string, value interface{}) error {\n\tstateTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel/sensor/%s/state\", sensorID)\n\n\tvar data []byte\n\tswitch v := value.(type) {\n\tcase string:\n\t\tdata = []byte(v)\n\tcase []byte:\n\t\tdata = v\n\tdefault:\n\t\tdata, _ = json.Marshal(map[string]interface{}{\"value\": value})\n\t}\n\n\treturn c.Publish(stateTopic, data)\n}\n\n// PublishZone publishes a zone occupancy sensor.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishZone(zoneID, zoneName string) error {\n\tif !c.config.DiscoveryEnabled {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tentityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_zone_%s\", zoneID)\n\treturn c.PublishSensor(entityID, fmt.Sprintf(\"%s Occupancy\", zoneName), \"\", \"people\")\n}\n\n// UpdateZoneOccupancy updates zone occupancy count.\nfunc (c *Client) UpdateZoneOccupancy(zoneID string, count int) error {\n\tentityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_zone_%s\", zoneID)\n\treturn c.UpdateSensorState(entityID, count)\n}\n\n// PublishPredictionSensors publishes prediction sensors for a person.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishPredictionSensors(personID, personName string) error {\n\tif !c.config.DiscoveryEnabled {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Predicted zone sensor\n\tpredictedZoneID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_predicted_zone\", personID)\n\tif err := c.PublishSensor(predictedZoneID, fmt.Sprintf(\"%s Predicted Zone\", personName), \"\", \"\"); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\t// Prediction confidence sensor\n\tconfidenceID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_prediction_confidence\", personID)\n\tif err := c.PublishSensor(confidenceID, fmt.Sprintf(\"%s Prediction Confidence\", personName), \"probability\", \"%\"); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\t// Estimated transition time sensor\n\ttransitionID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_transition_minutes\", personID)\n\tif err := c.PublishSensor(transitionID, fmt.Sprintf(\"%s Estimated Transition\", personName), \"duration\", \"min\"); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] MQTT: Published prediction sensors for %s\", personName)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// UpdatePredictionState updates prediction sensors for a person.\nfunc (c *Client) UpdatePredictionState(personID string, predictedZone, dataConfidence string, confidence, estimatedMinutes float64) error {\n\t// Update predicted zone\n\tpredictedZoneID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_predicted_zone\", personID)\n\tif err := c.UpdateSensorState(predictedZoneID, predictedZone); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\t// Update confidence (as percentage)\n\tconfidenceID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_prediction_confidence\", personID)\n\tconfidencePercent := confidence * 100\n\tif err := c.UpdateSensorState(confidenceID, fmt.Sprintf(\"%.1f\", confidencePercent)); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\t// Update estimated transition time\n\ttransitionID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_transition_minutes\", personID)\n\treturn c.UpdateSensorState(transitionID, fmt.Sprintf(\"%.1f\", estimatedMinutes))\n}\n\n// publishAllDiscoveryConfigs re-publishes all discovery configs.\nfunc (c *Client) publishAllDiscoveryConfigs() {\n\t// This is called on reconnect to ensure entities remain in HA\n\t// The actual entities are published as people/devices are registered\n\n\tc.mu.RLock()\n\tentities := len(c.publishedEntities)\n\tc.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[DEBUG] MQTT: Re-publishing %d discovery configs\", entities)\n}\n\n// RemoveEntity removes an entity from HA.\nfunc (c *Client) RemoveEntity(entityType, entityID string) error {\n\tconfigTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s/spaxel_%s/config\", c.config.DiscoveryPrefix, entityType, entityID)\n\n\t// Publish empty retained message to remove\n\treturn c.PublishRetained(configTopic, []byte{})\n}\n\n// GetBrokerHost extracts host from broker URL.\nfunc (c *Client) GetBrokerHost() string {\n\tif u, err := url.Parse(c.config.Broker); err == nil {\n\t\treturn u.Hostname()\n\t}\n\treturn c.config.Broker\n}\n\n// ─── Home Assistant Auto-Discovery Extensions ─────────────────────────────────────\n\n// PublishPersonPresenceDiscovery publishes HA auto-discovery for a person presence binary sensor.\nfunc (c *Client) c.config.TopicPrefix, personID)\n\n\tconfig := HADiscoveryConfig{\n\t\tName:       fmt.Sprintf(\"%s Presence\", personName),\n\t\tUniqueID:   entityID,\n\t\tStateTopic: stateTopic,\n\t\tPayloadOn:  \"home\",\n\t\tPayloadOff: \"not_home\",\n\t\tDeviceClass: \"presence\",\n\t\tDevice:     c.spaxelDevice,\n\t}\n\n\tpayload, _ := json.Marshal(config)\n\tif err := c.PublishRetained(configTopic, payload); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tc.mu.Lock()\n\tc.publishedEntities[entityID] = true\n\tc.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] MQTT: Published person presence discovery for %s\", personName)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// PublishZoneOccupancyDiscovery publishes HA auto-discovery for a zone occupancy sensor.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishZoneOccupancyDiscovery(zoneID, zoneName string) error {\n\tif !c.config.DiscoveryEnabled {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tentityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_zone_%s_occupancy\", c.config.MothershipID, zoneID)\n\tconfigTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/sensor/%s/config\", c.config.DiscoveryPrefix, entityID)\n\tstateTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/zone/%s/occupancy\", c.config.TopicPrefix, zoneID)\n\toccupantsTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/zone/%s/occupants\", c.config.TopicPrefix, zoneID)\n\n\tconfig := HADiscoveryConfig{\n\t\tName:         fmt.Sprintf(\"%s Occupancy\", zoneName),\n\t\tUniqueID:     entityID,\n\t\tStateTopic:   stateTopic,\n\t\tUnitOfMeasure: \"people\",\n\t\tJSONAttributesTopic: occupantsTopic,\n\t\tIcon:         \"mdi:account-multiple\",\n\t\tDevice:       c.spaxelDevice,\n\t}\n\n\tpayload, _ := json.Marshal(config)\n\tif err := c.PublishRetained(configTopic, payload); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tc.mu.Lock()\n\tc.publishedEntities[entityID] = true\n\tc.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] MQTT: Published zone occupancy discovery for %s\", zoneName)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// PublishZoneBinaryDiscovery publishes HA auto-discovery for a zone binary occupancy sensor.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishZoneBinaryDiscovery(zoneID, zoneName string) error {\n\tif !c.config.DiscoveryEnabled {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tentityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_zone_%s_occupied\", c.config.MothershipID, zoneID)\n\tconfigTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/binary_sensor/%s/config\", c.config.DiscoveryPrefix, entityID)\n\tstateTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/zone/%s/occupied\", c.config.TopicPrefix, zoneID)\n\n\tconfig := HADiscoveryConfig{\n\t\tName:       fmt.Sprintf(\"%s Occupied\", zoneName),\n\t\tUniqueID:   entityID,\n\t\tStateTopic: stateTopic,\n\t\tPayloadOn:  \"ON\",\n\t\tPayloadOff: \"OFF\",\n\t\tDeviceClass: \"occupancy\",\n\t\tIcon:       \"mdi:motion-sensor\",\n\t\tDevice:     c.spaxelDevice,\n\t}\n\n\tpayload, _ := json.Marshal(config)\n\tif err := c.PublishRetained(configTopic, payload); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tc.mu.Lock()\n\tc.publishedEntities[entityID] = true\n\tc.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] MQTT: Published zone binary discovery for %s\", zoneName)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// PublishFallDetectionDiscovery publishes HA auto-discovery for fall detection.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishFallDetectionDiscovery() error {\n\tif !c.config.DiscoveryEnabled {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tentityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_fall_detected\", defined %}ON{% else %}OFF{% endif %}\",\n\t\tDeviceClass: \"safety\",\n\t\tIcon:       \"mdi:human-greeting-proximity\",\n\t\tDevice:     c.spaxelDevice,\n\t}\n\n\tpayload, _ := true\n\tc.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] MQTT: Published fall detection discovery\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// PublishSystemHealthDiscovery publishes HA auto-discovery for system health sensor.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishSystemHealthDiscovery() error {\n\tif !c.config.DiscoveryEnabled {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tentityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_detection_quality\", := HADiscoveryConfig{\n\t\tName:       \"Detection Quality\",\n\t\tUniqueID:   entityID,\n\t\tStateTopic: stateTopic,\n\t\tUnitOfMeasure: \"%\",\n\t\tDeviceClass: \"\",\n\t\tIcon:       \"mdi:gauge\",\n\t\tDevice:     c.spaxelDevice,\n\t}\n\n\tpayload, _ := json.Marshal(config)\n\tif err := c.PublishRetained(configTopic, payload); err != nil {\n\t\treturn publishes HA auto-discovery for system mode select.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishSystemModeDiscovery() error {\n\tif !c.config.DiscoveryEnabled {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tentityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_system_mode\", c.config.MothershipID)\n\tconfigTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/select/%s/config\", c.config.DiscoveryPrefix, entityID)\n\tstateTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/system/mode\", c.config.TopicPrefix)\n\tcommandTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/command/system_mode\", c.config.TopicPrefix)\n\n\tconfig := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"name\": fmt.Sprintf(\"Spaxel System Mode\"),\n\t\t\"unique_id\": entityID,\n\t\t\"state_topic\": stateTopic,\n\t\t\"command_topic\": commandTopic,\n\t\t\"options\": []string{\"home\", \"away\", \"sleep\"},\n\t\t\"device\": c.spaxelDevice,\n\t\t\"icon\": \"mdi:home-switch\",\n\t}\n\n\tpayload, _ := json.Marshal(config)\n\tif err := c.PublishRetained(configTopic, payload); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tc.mu.Lock()\n\tc.publishedEntities[entityID] = true\n\tc.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] MQTT: Published system mode discovery\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// ─── State Publishing ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n// PublishPersonPresence publishes a person's presence state.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishPersonPresence(personID string, home bool) error {\n\tstateTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/person/%s/presence\", c.config.TopicPrefix, personID)\n\n\tpayload := \"not_home\"\n\tif home {\n\t\tpayload = \"home\"\n\t}\n\n\treturn c.PublishRetained(stateTopic, []byte(payload))\n}\n\n// PublishZoneOccupancy publishes zone occupancy count.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishZoneOccupancy(zoneID string, count int) error {\n\tstateTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/zone/%s/occupancy\", c.config.TopicPrefix, zoneID)\n\treturn c.PublishRetained(stateTopic, []byte(fmt.Sprintf(\"%d\", count)))\n}\n\n// PublishZoneOccupants publishes the list of people in a zone.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishZoneOccupants(zoneID string, occupants []string) error {\n\tstateTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/zone/%s/occupants\", c.config.TopicPrefix, zoneID)\n\n\tpayload, err := json.Marshal(occupants)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treturn c.PublishRetained(stateTopic, payload)\n}\n\n// PublishZoneOccupied publishes zone occupied binary state.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishZoneOccupied(zoneID string, occupied bool) error {\n\tstateTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/zone/%s/occupied\", c.config.TopicPrefix, zoneID)\n\n\tpayload := \"OFF\"\n\tif occupied {\n\t\tpayload = \"ON\"\n\t}\n\n\treturn c.PublishRetained(stateTopic, []byte(payload))\n}\n\n// PublishFallEvent publishes a fall detection event.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishFallEvent(personID, personLabel, zoneID, zoneName string, timestamp time.Time) error {\n\ttopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/fall_detected\", c.config.TopicPrefix)\n\n\tevent := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"person_id\":    personID,\n\t\t\"person_label\": personLabel,\n\t\t\"zone_id\":      zoneID,\n\t\t\"zone_name\":    zoneName,\n\t\t\"timestamp\":    timestamp.Format(time.RFC3339),\n\t}\n\n\tpayload, err := json.Marshal(event)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\t// Fall events are NOT retained\n\treturn c.Publish(topic, payload)\n}\n\n// PublishSystemHealth publishes system health metrics.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishSystemHealth(nodeCount, onlineCount int, detectionQuality float64, mode string) error {\n\ttopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/system/health\", c.config.TopicPrefix)\n\n\thealth := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"node_count\":         nodeCount,\n\t\t\"online_count\":       onlineCount,\n\t\t\"detection_quality\":  detectionQuality,\n\t\t\"mode\":               mode,\n\t\t\"timestamp\":          time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339),\n\t}\n\n\tpayload, err := json.Marshal(health)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treturn c.PublishRetained(topic, payload)\n}\n\n// PublishSystemMode publishes the current system mode.\nfunc (c *Client) PublishSystemMode(mode string) error {\n\ttopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/system/mode\", c.config.TopicPrefix)\n\treturn c.PublishRetained(topic, []byte(mode))\n}\n\n// SubscribeToSystemMode subscribes to system mode command topic.\nfunc (c *Client) SubscribeToSystemMode(handler func(mode string)) error {\n\ttopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/command/system_mode\", c.config.TopicPrefix)\n\n\treturn c.Subscribe(topic, func(_ string, payload []byte) {\n\t\tmode := string(payload)\n\t\tif mode == \"home\" || mode == \"away\" || mode == \"sleep\" {\n\t\t\thandler(mode)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n}\n\n// RemovePersonDiscovery removes a person's HA auto-discovery entity.\nfunc (c *Client) RemovePersonDiscovery(personID string) error {\n\tentityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_%s_presence\", c.config.MothershipID, personID)\n\tconfigTopic := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/binary_sensor/%s/config\", c.config.DiscoveryPrefix, entityID)\n\treturn c.PublishRetained(configTopic, []byte{})\n}\n\n// RemoveZoneDiscovery removes a zone's HA auto-discovery entities.\nfunc (c *Client) RemoveZoneDiscovery(zoneID string) error {\n\t// Remove occupancy sensor\n\toccupancyEntityID := fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel_%s_zone_%s_occupancy\", c.config.MothershipID, zoneID)\n\toccupancyTopic := struct {\n\tmu     sync.RWMutex\n\tconfig Config\n\tclient mqtt.Client\n\n\t// State tracking\n\tconnected     bool\n\tspaxelDevice  HomeAssistantDevice\n\tpublishedEntities map[string]bool // entity ID -> published\n\n\t// Callbacks\n\tonConnect    func()\n\tonDisconnect func()\n}\n\n// NewClient creates a new MQTT client.\nfunc NewClient(cfg Config) (*Client, error) {\n\tif cfg.Broker == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"MQTT broker URL required\")\n\t}\n\n\tif cfg.MothershipID == \"\" {\n\t\tcfg.MothershipID = \"spaxel\"\n\t}\n\tif cfg.ClientID == \"\" {\n\t\tcfg.ClientID = fmt.Sprintf(\"spaxel-%s\", cfg.MothershipID)\n\t}\n\tif cfg.TopicPrefix == \"\" {\n\t\tcfg.TopicPrefix = \"spaxel\"\n\t}\n\tif cfg.DiscoveryPrefix == \"\" {\n\t\tcfg.DiscoveryPrefix = \"homeassistant\"\n\t}\n\tif cfg.KeepAlive == 0 {\n\t\tcfg.KeepAlive = 30 * time.Second\n\t}\n\tif cfg.ConnectTimeout == 0 {\n\t\tcfg.ConnectTimeout = 10 * time.Second\n\t}\n\tif cfg.ReconnectMin == 0 {\n\t\tcfg.ReconnectMin = 5 * time.Second\n\t}\n\tif cfg.ReconnectMax == 0 {\n\t\tcfg.ReconnectMax = 120 * time.Second\n\t}\n\n\tc := &Client{\n\t\tconfig: cfg,\n\t\tspaxelDevice:
